chapter_context.summary: Reflecting on the incredible love of God that makes us His children. John contrasts those who practice righteousness and love with those who practice sin and hatred.

outline.text: Children of God and the Practice of Righteousness
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Children of God and the Practice of Righteousness (3:1-10), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 1 John.

outline.text: Love One Another: The Evidence of Life
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Love One Another: The Evidence of Life (3:11-24), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 1 John.

1.commentary:
### Tyndale Study Notes
**Chapter Overview: 1 John 3**
This verse contributes to the central message of 1 John, emphasizing the grace and truth revealed in Jesus Christ.
1.full_commentary:
### Matthew Henry Commentary
Matthew Henry offers devotional reflections on the spiritual impact of this passage for the believer.

### Jamieson-Fausset-Brown
JFB analysis explores the historical context and original language nuances of this portion of the New Testament.

devotional.question: How does this passage impact your daily walk with God?

cultural_historical.title: New Testament Context
cultural_historical.text: Written in the 1st century AD to diverse groups of believers across the Roman Empire.
